---
title: "Connor Lockhart's Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my blog! I am Connor Martinez Lockhart, a Math PhD candidate at the University of Maryland studying model theory with applications in probability, geometry and combinatorics. 

You can find my main website, including my CV, publications, and projects, here: [https://conair94.github.io](https://conair94.github.io).

This blog contains my writing across a few different areas:
- **Academic Work:** Updates on my research, teaching, and mathematical studies.
- **Synaptic Static:** My music reviews and thoughts on various albums and artists.
- **Musings:** Random thoughts, brain dumps, and unstructured ideas.
